name: Forty Thousand acceptance promotes departure pressure

source.purpose: Accepting the exact-price job early should answer the negotiation objective and promote/reframe into departure pressure instead of extending lien clearance until the old turn floor.

pacingContract.chapterQuestion: Will the crew accept, reshape, or refuse the exact-price offer before the debt closes?
acceptableResolutions: The PC accepts the job with enough terms to leave.
The station-exit pressure changes from negotiation to action.
pacingContract.earlyPressure: Make the exact number and Sable's visible approach impossible to treat as coincidence.
pacingContract.middlePressure: Force one concrete term, route risk, or debt mechanism into the open.
pacingContract.latePressure: Convert delay into a station hold, broker deadline, or passenger safety risk.
closeWhenAny: The PC has chosen a concrete path for the offer and debt surface.
The station-exit pressure changes from negotiation to action.
avoidExtendingFor: Extra haggling after the PC has taken a clear position.
Re-explaining the debt instead of changing who has leverage.

thread_spine.title: Decide whether to accept Sable's exact-price job
thread_spine.resolutionCriteria: The PC accepts, refuses, or reshapes the offer into a concrete path.
thread_spine.failureMode: The debt closes while the crew stays trapped in negotiation.
thread_spine.retrievalCue: exact-price offer, Sable job, debt surface

thread_departure.title: Leave station with the sealed freight
thread_departure.resolutionCriteria: The crew gets the freight, passenger, and ship clear of station authority.
thread_departure.failureMode: Departure becomes a hold, search, or seizure.
thread_departure.retrievalCue: departure clearance, sealed freight, station hold

turns.narratorProse: Sable names the exact debt price.
The crate is sealed and the clock is short.

input.playerInput: We take the job. Get the crate aboard and start departure clearance.

narrator.prose: Sable accepts the commitment. The old lien question collapses into a harder one: whether you can get the sealed freight and Maren Voss off-station before authority notices the route.

transitions.reason: The PC accepted the exact-price job and converted the debt negotiation into departure action.

userMessageContainsAll: Leave station with the sealed freight
